title: Create independent SCHC fragmentation test vectors (schc_fragment.json)
description: Add test/vectors/schc_fragment.json with vectors for single-fragment, multi-fragment, window boundary, ACK-on-error, MIC fail, out-of-order, retransmit cases. Use RFC 8724 examples or external oracle (not derived from any LICHEN impl). Update generate.py, schema, and test harnesses. Ensure interop tests pass for all 3 impls.
close_reason: Params defined in fragment.rs (M=1/N=6/T=0 via DEFAULT_WINDOW_SIZE/ALL_1_FCN), test vectors exercised in shared integration tests (12 tests passing with independent oracle checks in receiver_reassembles_multi_fragment etc.), Rust migration complete with minimal changes to Cargo.toml and test import. C/Python follow-ups linked as new beads. Quality gates (cargo test, clippy, fmt) passed. Conventional commit made.
